allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\Repos\\SPT\\backend; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'c:\\Repos\\SPT\\backend'; python -W ignore -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host "Server started")

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "League:" $data.league_name; Write-Host "Teams:"; $data.teams | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("  " + $_.display_name + " total=" + $_.total_value\) })

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/teams/9" -UseBasicParsing\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Team:" $data.display_name; Write-Host "Total:" $data.total_value; Write-Host "Contention:" $data.contention_score; Write-Host "Smash:"; $data.categorized.smash | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("  " + $_.name + " " + $_.position + " " + $_.fc_value\) })

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/trades?roster_id=9" -UseBasicParsing\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Trade ideas for AAlsup:" $data.Count; $data | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \("  " + $_.team_a.display_name + " gives: " + \($_.a_gives | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) + " <-> " + $_.team_b.display_name + " gives: " + \($_.b_gives | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) + " delta=" + $_.value_delta\) })

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/trades?roster_id=9" -UseBasicParsing\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Trade ideas for AAlsup:" $data.Count; $data | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $aGives = \($_.a_gives | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.name\)\($\($_.fc_value\)\)" }\) -join ", "; $bGives = \($_.b_gives | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.name\)\($\($_.fc_value\)\)" }\) -join ", "; Write-Host "  [$\($_.team_a.display_name\)] $aGives <-> [$\($_.team_b.display_name\)] $bGives  delta=$\($_.value_delta\)" })
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'c:\\Repos\\SPT\\frontend'; npm run dev" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Write-Host "Frontend starting...")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.sleeper.app/v1/league/1312113980805742592/rosters" -UseBasicParsing -SkipCertificateCheck; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; foreach \($r in $data\) { Write-Host "roster=$\($r.roster_id\) picks=$\($r.picks | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" })

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/sync" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\); $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object ok, league_name, teams_synced)

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592" -UseBasicParsing\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $data.teams | Select-Object display_name, total_value, player_value, pick_value | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'c:\\Repos\\SPT\\backend'; python -W ignore -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "Backend started")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $sync = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/sync" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\); $resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $data.teams | Select-Object display_name, total_value, player_value, pick_value | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'c:\\Repos\\SPT\\frontend'; npm run dev" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "Frontend starting...")

PowerShell($resp = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/leagues/1312113980805742592/trades?roster_id=9" -UseBasicParsing\); $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $data | Select-Object -First 4 | ForEach-Object { $aGives = \($_.a_gives | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) -join ", "; $bGives = \($_.b_gives | ForEach-Object { $_.name }\) -join ", "; Write-Host "$\($_.team_a.display_name\) gives [$aGives] \(lineup_delta=$\($_.lineup_delta_a\)\)"; Write-Host "$\($_.team_b.display_name\) gives [$bGives] \(lineup_delta=$\($_.lineup_delta_b\)\)"; Write-Host "---" })
